(I Just) Died in Your Arms Tonight
As performed by: Cutting Crew
Key:  , Original 
INTRO:  Bm   E4   Em  A   F#m   x2
CHORUS ½:
Bm        Em                  A          F#m                        Bm
I, I just died in your arms tonight   It must've been something you said
       Em                  A                                  Bm
I just died in your arms tonight (No drums until this part)

VERSE 1:
Bm                                          G∆
I keep looking for something I can't get    Broken hearts lie all around me -
    A                              F#4
And I don't see an easy way to get out of this
    Bm                                       G∆
Her diary, it sits by the bedside table  The curtains are closed, the cat's in the cradle
A                                             F#4
Who would've thought that a boy like me could come to this.  Ohhh -

CHORUS:
Bm        Em                  A          F#m                        Bm
I, I just died in your arms tonight   It must've been something you said
       Em                  A     F#m
I just died in your arms tonight,   ohhh
Bm        Em                  A          F#m                       Bm
I, I just died in your arms tonight   It must've been some kind of kiss
  Em                A     F#m                          1st | G∆  Bm
I should've walked away       I should've walked away  2nd | BRIDGE
                                                       3rd | OUTRO
VERSE 2:
         Bm                                     G∆
Is there any just cause for feeling like this?  On the surface I'm a name on a list
   A                            F#4
I try to be discreet, but then blow it again
    Bm                                               G∆
I'm lost and I'm found, it's my final mistake, she's loving by proxy, no give and all take
        A                                    F#4
'Cause I've been thrilled to fantasy one too many times.  Ohh -  (CHORUS)

BRIDGE:
G                          Em
  It was a long hot night, she made it easy, she made it feel right
G                                           F#                                          Bm
 But now it's over, the moment has gone   I followed my hands not my head, I know I was wrong

SOLO:  Bm   Em   A   F#m   x2

(CHORUS)

OUTRO:  Bm   Em   A   F#m   x6   (fade out)
